testcase.name: test_evite_sus_one_day_create

failure.message: selenium.common.exceptions.StaleElementReferenceException: Message: stale element reference: stale element not found in the current frame (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.126); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#staleelementreferenceexception Stacktrace: GetHandleVerifier [0x00A70283+25139] (No symbol) [0x009FB234] (No symbol) [0x008D04A3] (No symbol) [0x008D6EA1] (No symbol) [0x008D8F9A] (No symbol) [0x008D9017] (No symbol) [0x00917BC1] (No symbol) [0x0091868B] (No symbol) [0x0090DD71] (No symbol) [0x0093CF84] (No symbol) [0x0090D8E4] (No symbol) [0x0093D1B4] (No symbol) [0x0095E6E1] (No symbol) [0x0093CD36] (No symbol) [0x0090BD29] (No symbol) [0x0090D064] GetHandleVerifier [0x00D7B143+3215603] GetHandleVerifier [0x00D922BA+3310186] GetHandleVerifier [0x00D8C4D2+3286146] GetHandleVerifier [0x00B09C80+654384] (No symbol) [0x00A045BD] (No symbol) [0x00A014A8] (No symbol) [0x00A01647] (No symbol) [0x009F3D20] BaseThreadInitThunk [0x758B5D49+25] RtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x779FCEBB+107] RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x779FCE41+561]

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_sus_one_day_create.TestEviteSUSOneDayCreate object at 0x7fa3adfa2660> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fa3adff9850>
def test_evite_sus_one_day_create(self, config): _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] sign_up_sheet_maker = config.pages["sign_up_sheet_maker"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(inspect.stack()[0][3]) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time() if host: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = host else: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}")
sign_up_sheet_maker.select_sus_event(sus_event="one_day")
sign_up_sheet_maker.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) sign_up_sheet_maker.create_sheet_one_day(test_data=self._json_test_data) sign_up_sheet_maker.verify_sheet_sign_ups(test_data=self._json_test_data)
sign_up_sheet_maker.publish_sheet() shareable_link = sign_up_sheet_maker.copy_shareable_link()
login_modal.sign_out()
# Get Volunteer view to build SUS data config.driver.get(shareable_link) logger.info(f"Going volunteer url - {config.driver.current_url}")
sign_up_sheet = sign_up_sheet_maker.get_sign_up_sheet_one_day()
volunteers = sign_up_sheet_maker.initialize_volunteers(volunteers=self._json_test_data["volunteers"])
for volunteer in volunteers:
if volunteer["registered"]: logger.info(f"Registering guest: {volunteer['name']}")
# Change register data self._json_test_data["register"]["first_name"] = volunteer["name"] self._json_test_data["register"]["email"] = volunteer["email_addr"]
# Register login_modal.register(test_data=self._json_test_data['register'], existing_user=True)
sus_row = sign_up_sheet_maker.get_random_sus_row(sus=sign_up_sheet)
> sign_up_sheet_maker.select_sign_up(sus_row)
_test_name = 'test_evite_sus_one_day_create' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fa3adff9850> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7fa3adff94c0> host = 'automation test' logger = <Logger test_evite_sus_one_day_create (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7fa3adff86e0> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7fa3adff9a60> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7fa3adff88f0> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_sus_one_day_create.TestEviteSUSOneDayCreate object at 0x7fa3adfa2660> shareable_link = 'https://test4.evite.me/5guxegHxFx' sign_up_sheet = [{'row_count': 2, 'row_filled': 2, 'row_title': 'drinks'}, {'row_count': 5, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'chips'}, {'row_count': 10, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'food'}] sign_up_sheet_maker = <commons.pages.evite.sign_up_sheet_maker.SignUpSheetMaker object at 0x7fa3adff9af0> sus_row = {'row_count': 5, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'chips'} user_email_addr = 'evite-02022026-100824-20-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' volunteer = {'comment': 'THIS IS A VOLUNTEER COMMENT', 'email_addr': 'evite-volunteer-20260202-1009-507838-test@evitetest.com', 'guest_count': 0, 'kids_count': 0, ...} volunteers = [{'comment': 'THIS IS A VOLUNTEER COMMENT', 'email_addr': 'evite-volunteer-20260202-1009-507651-test@evitetest.com', '...ENT', 'email_addr': 'evite-volunteer-20260202-1009-507838-test@evitetest.com', 'guest_count': 0, 'kids_count': 0, ...}]

def check_response(self, response: dict[str, Any]) -> None: """Checks that a JSON response from the WebDriver does not have an error.
:Args: - response - The JSON response from the WebDriver server as a dictionary object.
:Raises: If the response contains an error message. """ status = response.get("status", None) if not status or status == ErrorCode.SUCCESS: return value = None message = response.get("message", "") screen: str = response.get("screen", "") stacktrace = None if isinstance(status, int): value_json = response.get("value", None) if value_json and isinstance(value_json, str): try: value = json.loads(value_json) if isinstance(value, dict): if len(value) == 1: value = value["value"] status = value.get("error", None) if not status: status = value.get("status", ErrorCode.UNKNOWN_ERROR) message = value.get("value") or value.get("message") if not isinstance(message, str): value = message message = message.get("message") else: message = value.get("message", None) except ValueError: pass
exception_class: type[WebDriverException] e = ErrorCode() error_codes = [item for item in dir(e) if not item.startswith("__")] for error_code in error_codes: error_info = getattr(ErrorCode, error_code) if isinstance(error_info, list) and status in error_info: exception_class = getattr(ExceptionMapping, error_code, WebDriverException) break else: exception_class = WebDriverException
if not value: value = response["value"] if isinstance(value, str): raise exception_class(value) if message == "" and "message" in value: message = value["message"]
screen = None # type: ignore[assignment] if "screen" in value: screen = value["screen"]
stacktrace = None st_value = value.get("stackTrace") or value.get("stacktrace") if st_value: if isinstance(st_value, str): stacktrace = st_value.split("\n") else: stacktrace = [] try: for frame in st_value: line = frame.get("lineNumber", "") file = frame.get("fileName", "<anonymous>") if line: file = f"{file}:{line}" meth = frame.get("methodName", "<anonymous>") if "className" in frame: meth = f"{frame['className']}.{meth}" msg = " at %s (%s)" msg = msg % (meth, file) stacktrace.append(msg) except TypeError: pass if exception_class == UnexpectedAlertPresentException: alert_text = None if "data" in value: alert_text = value["data"].get("text") elif "alert" in value: alert_text = value["alert"].get("text") raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace, alert_text) # type: ignore[call-arg] # mypy is not smart enough here > raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.StaleElementReferenceException: Message: stale element reference: stale element not found in the current frame E (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.126); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#staleelementreferenceexception E Stacktrace: E GetHandleVerifier [0x00A70283+25139] E (No symbol) [0x009FB234] E (No symbol) [0x008D04A3] E (No symbol) [0x008D6EA1] E (No symbol) [0x008D8F9A] E (No symbol) [0x008D9017] E (No symbol) [0x00917BC1] E (No symbol) [0x0091868B] E (No symbol) [0x0090DD71] E (No symbol) [0x0093CF84] E (No symbol) [0x0090D8E4] E (No symbol) [0x0093D1B4] E (No symbol) [0x0095E6E1] E (No symbol) [0x0093CD36] E (No symbol) [0x0090BD29] E (No symbol) [0x0090D064] E GetHandleVerifier [0x00D7B143+3215603] E GetHandleVerifier [0x00D922BA+3310186] E GetHandleVerifier [0x00D8C4D2+3286146] E GetHandleVerifier [0x00B09C80+654384] E (No symbol) [0x00A045BD] E (No symbol) [0x00A014A8] E (No symbol) [0x00A01647] E (No symbol) [0x009F3D20] E BaseThreadInitThunk [0x758B5D49+25] E RtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x779FCEBB+107] E RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x779FCE41+561]
